name: tencent-tix-saas
description: OctoBus package for Tencent Security Threat Intelligence Center TIX SaaS read-only intelligence query APIs.

Tencent_TIX_SaaS.Tencent_TIX_SaaS/QueryI.name: query-ioc
Tencent_TIX_SaaS.Tencent_TIX_SaaS/QueryI.description: Query Tencent TIX IOC compromise intelligence.

Tencent_TIX_SaaS.Tencent_TIX_SaaS/GetIPI.name: get-ip-ingress-info
Tencent_TIX_SaaS.Tencent_TIX_SaaS/GetIPI.description: Query Tencent TIX active attack source IP intelligence.

Tencent_TIX_SaaS.Tencent_TIX_SaaS/GetFil.name: get-file-info
Tencent_TIX_SaaS.Tencent_TIX_SaaS/GetFil.description: Query Tencent TIX file reputation intelligence.
